reviews.review_title: Now this is real Mixed reality
reviews.review_description: This is definitely my favorite game in my great Quest library...the feeling you get when that portal opens up to another world right before your eyes never gets old and you really get the feeling of being in possession of some secret futuristic  portal technology...and the bullets flying in and out of your world make you feel like you're the star of an A list sci-fi movie...Developer team thank you for this Sci-fi dream i only have 1 request  please give us more solo campaign missions  thanks.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for making this your favorite — it means a lot to the team!
We really appreciate your thoughts, and we've heard your request for additional campaign content. 🚀

reviews.review_description:
Gameplay
The play area is generous, with clear boundaries marked by four pillars you don’t cross. Seeing the environment blend into my living room for the first time felt like the start of something special. At first, you might think this is going to be a simple rail shooter like Time Crisis or House of the Dead, but the shifting portals and enemies rushing into your space force you to move constantly. It creates a real sense of immersion.
My only issue is that sometimes too many portals open at once, and the chaos becomes overwhelming. It makes you wonder if the Portal Technician is incompetent… or maybe there’s a saboteur in the agency. Something to explore in a sequel, perhaps.
The Bad
The last two stages were frustrating. The boss health bar felt way too long, and your weapons barely chipped away at it. Combine that with nonstop enemies pouring out of multiple portals, and the experience becomes more exhausting than fun. My arms were burning from pumping the shotgun, and not in a good “VR workout” way. I’d definitely deduct points for those final stages, even though I know most players won’t push through to the end like I did.


Graphics
I felt genuinely immersed. Seeing the pillars mapped into my living room was incredibly cool. The stylized graphics — with their lighting effects, reflections, and subtle shading — fit the Quest hardware perfectly. The slightly Fortnite‑like aesthetic works well; it avoids the trap of trying to look hyper‑realistic and breaking immersion.

Multiplayer
I had fun with the map editing in my apartment, this would be a great, great, supergreat experience I would enjoy forever. Sadly, I don’t know anyone else with a Quest to enjoy this mode,  but for the possibilities, I give it high scores.  It was fun shooting an RPG with my dog!
Thank you for giving us this option!

developer_response.body:
This review is incredibly thoughtful — thank you! ❤️

You're right that the last two levels are brutal — they're designed to really ramp up the challenge and make full use of your weapons and upgrades. One thing that might help is focusing on the boss while keeping the incoming enemies in check.

Regarding multiplayer, maybe you could try playing a few games with bots in your own space. We also have an experimental feature that lets you play remotely with others, and you're very welcome to join our Discord community to find people to play with. 
Link: https://discord.com/invite/EGrr5UPeb9

We really appreciate you taking the time to write this up! 🙌

reviews.review_description:
Every once in a while the game actually works, and it’s great, but I have a few major issues with the game. 
- Space matching is useless. The map sometimes spawns way off, or way above or below me, which is fixable after you start a match and can reset height, but then if you needed it to be the right height to realign since the space matching did nothing, it resets the height when you go back to editing so you can realign
- It almost never actually shows where the other player is accurately. Commonly, the game thinks the player is 5 feet away and it’s unfixable
- I hate having to leave the match to switch maps. It would be nice to be able to easily switch it or even add multiple maps to an area so during a match the players can vote on the next map or have it be randomized

developer_response.body:
Sorry about this, but you do have to know a few more tricks in some situations:
- Check our FAQ, search for 'Spatial Ops FAQ' we list our best tricks there
- Your Quests have propably too many overlapping spatial pictures overlapping, and it jumps to one then the other, the trick is to whie this data. Here's what our FAQ says:

"Clear the physical space history in the Quest system settings: Press the Meta button on the right controller to open the system menu. Go to Quest Settings > Privacy and Safety > Device Permissions > Clear physical space history.

If the issue persists, try the additional steps:

-  Ensure Enhanced Spatial Services is enabled: Go to Settings > Privacy and Safety > Device Permissions > Enhanced Spatial Services (both host and clients).

- Place a new Gather Here sign: In Map Preview, click the New Gather Point button to place a new Gather Here sign at your current position (host).

- Before placing the sign, turn 360 degrees to let the headset capture the surrounding space.

- It's best to place the new Gather Here sign near the center of your map.

- Select a location with good contrast points around. The headset looks at your surroundings and keeps contrast points to build a spatial picture, then joiners try to find those contrast points to understand where the Gather Here sign is. A good counter-example is that clients could never recognize the Gather Here sign in a perfectly white room. Most homes and outdoor locations naturally have enough contrast, but in some offices with uniform walls and floors, it's helpful to keep this in mind."

reviews.review_description:
Absolutely amazing. Never played anything quite like this. I'm hoping more DLC for the Campaign mode will happen , or maybe a whole new campaign entirely. Both Arena and Campaign are just fantastic. Well done devs!!
Would love to see an Arena tournament using pre-made arenas and rulesets by the devs.
Are any further updates imminent please? I can hardly wait to see what is coming next!

developer_response.body:
Many thanks for the review! 🔥

That’s actually already happening! Hop into our Discord, we’ve got tons of players and devs uploading their own custom arenas and rulesets to the map library. See you there!

reviews.review_description: I'd say I'm new to VR so maybe I'll easily impressed, but this is the kind of VR experience I expect to have. Very cool and engaging. Feels like real FPS!

What a great game! I haven’t been able to fully explore it yet due to some chaos in our house, but when things get more organized around here this game is going to be next level I’m sure. I’m really looking forward to the multiplayer aspect. Well done, folks!

developer_response.body:
Wow! Thank you so much for the 5-star review!
Hope you get the chance to dive in more soon. 🎮

reviews.review_description: Great game and beautiful map potential. Perfect for when the brothers over or your buddies. It’s one of the main games we play. 10/10

forget the campaign. the mixed reality pvp is quite possibly one of the most things to do on VR in a house with at least two headsets. Being able to duck behind your own couch and shoot your brother in the face all in VR is an indescribably awesome experience

developer_response.body:
Sounds like you having a blast with your brother! Glad you guys are having fun!

If you ever sharing your moment on social media, don't forget to tag us! We would love to see it!

And thank you for the 5 stars! :D

reviews.review_description: Incredibly impressed every time I play. You don’t even need a large play space - I played seated in a small area and it was a great experience, although an official seated setting would be incredible.

developer_response.body: Happy to hear that you're enjoying the game! Thank you for the kind words and feedback.

reviews.review_description: Amazing MR shooter, one of a kind on the market. Got it with my meta horizon+ subscription and its great. Just one thing, I cant seem to play the arena mode because when I click play nothing happens, even with an arena set up. But otherwise I definitely recommend this game

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the kind words and 5 stars!

I'm here to help you, to play Arena :) 
If you are playing Arena by yourself, please make sure to add bots to play with before starting the match.

If you are interested in creating your own maps, you can click "Guided Map Creation" tutorial for a step by step guide on how to set up your own maps and bot paths.

Feel free to join our Discord if you run into any other trouble!
https://discord.com/invite/EGrr5UPeb9

reviews.review_description: This is the best mixed reality hand hands down!  The arena mod is what i wanted from this but the WHOLE game is amazing‼️ 👏 🤩  Do yourself a favor and buy this,  you won't be disappointed.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much! We really appreciate your support! 🙌

reviews.review_description:
Although the email response was late, I still appreciate your willingness to address the issue. I have updated my rating to five stars.

If this can be fixed, it is a very fun and enjoyable game. By the way, I purchased three copies of the game and six VR headsets specifically so I could enjoy playing together with my family.
-----------------
Some accounts can access the game, while others cannot. Permission errors keep appearing, forcing me to repeatedly reset the headset and re-invite accounts. The issue still hasn’t been resolved, and I haven’t received any response to my emails.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for updating the review! We’re also hoping this issue will be resolved soon. Multiplayer with six headsets is really fun!
-----------------
Hi, thanks for reporting this. There’s currently a Meta OS version 2.1 bug affecting permissions. If you’re using App Sharing with a secondary account, that account may not be able to access Arena due to an “Insufficient Permission” error. Even if all permissions are enabled, the OS system may incorrectly report them as disabled to Spatial Ops. 

On OS version 83, everything is still working correctly.

We’re in contact with the Meta team and will share updates through emails as soon as we have more information. Stay tuned!

reviews.review_description: Great game... easy to get up and running, and with the boundary setup you can have great fun in a relatively small space without fear of bumping into things. Attacks come from front, back, left and right... and even from above. Would definitely recommend.

developer_response.body:
Thanks a ton for the 5 stars! We are so glad you are enjoying the AR experience.
Don't forget to try our Arena/Survival Mode, it fits for small space as well!

reviews.review_description:
I've only played the solo campaign so far which is a neat twist on the on rails shooter style which utilises mixed reality to make things feel more kinetic.

I've really enjoyed it and I expect the arena mode is a blast but I need more space and an opponent to test this out. Worth adding to your library.

developer_response.body:
Love hearing that you’re enjoying playing the campaign! ❤️

You could try playing with bots and different scenarios in Arena — even with limited space, you might find some neat ways to set up a map.

reviews.review_description: What an awsome game, fantastic use of mixed reality, really gets the adrenalin pumping.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the 5 stars! We’re so glad that you’re loving the experience.

reviews.review_description: I just had the best time with my son playing Spacial Ops. The game is really intense, but the arena is so fun, and the graphics are so realistic.

developer_response.body:
We’re so glad you and your son are having such a blast with Spatial Ops. That's Amazing to hear! 

Thank you both for playing and for the 5 stars!

reviews.review_description: This is truly the most innovative use of the Quest 3 I have seen to date.  I would love to see more added to the campaign as its a fantastic way to introduce more people to the technology.  Well done team.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the 5 stars!  it’s so rewarding to see players like you enjoying it! and yes please tell your friends how fun Spatial Ops is!

Also join our Discord channel to see other players and talk to devs for tips or feedback you have, we would love to hear it!

reviews.review_description: I bought the Bhaptics tact suit specifically for this game....but it's not working at all....no haptic feedback whatsoever...I'm testing it on my QUEST 2 (will test on my QUEST 3) later...but no haptics whatsoever...I'm in campaign mode and nothing...only ONE time I got shot in the back...it's paired correctly, dialed all the way up and on top of this, the suit keeps disconnecting and I have to power on....am I missing something?...is this a QUEST 2 issue and it will only work on the 3 or some setting I need to turn on?

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the amazing review! 
This truly made our day! ♥️

reviews.review_description:
Have played the capture-the-flag arena mode in large rooms with several people in both teams and it is just super fantastic.
Having a single player mode as well is a great way to keep up until I manage to gather people for another arena happening again.
All in all, one of the most essential games on the Quest!

developer_response.body:
Thanks a ton for the 5 stars! We’re so glad to have you as part of our community. 
Please tag us in your socials when you play the game with your friends, we'd love to see it!

If you ever have feedback or ideas, feel free to drop in our Discord: https://discord.com/invite/EGrr5UPeb9. You can also get more tips from other players and the developers

reviews.review_description: Great fun

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the review! 

We're always looking for ways to improve, if you have any feedback to make the game better, feel free to reach out to our support team at support@resolutiongames.com, or join our Discord community for a more direct conversation: https://discord.com/invite/EGrr5UPeb9.

reviews.review_description:
It’s sad to say, but while looking to buy a new home, one of the main things I was looking for was a large play area for this game. We found a property that came with a 40’ by 100’ storage shelter.. can you guess what I’ll be doing with that space? I’m very excited to set up large maps and having the family over for some games.

Only down side is now I’ll need to keep an eye on marketplace to buy a few used quests for the nieces and nephews :p

developer_response.body: Huge thanks for the 5-star rating! Our devs pour their hearts into every update, and it’s so rewarding to see players like you enjoying it!

reviews.review_description: This is just the best, mixreality game The developer has done a great job.Keep up the good work

developer_response.body: Thank you for the review and support. ❤️

reviews.review_description: Spatial Ops is a game that truly showcases what the Meta Quest 3 can do with its pass through cameras and mixed reality. I think it’s a must play for anyone looking for a fun mixed reality experience.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the awesome review, Agent! 
Hope you keep having a blast 🙌

reviews.review_description: Amazing, that's it.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your support! Let's have fun!

reviews.review_description:
"Honestly, Spatial Ops for Meta Horizon has completely blown me away and redefined what's possible for collaboration and shared experiences in VR. From the moment you dive in, it's clear this isn't just another app; it's a foundational tool that makes connecting and working together feel incredibly natural and deeply immersive.

One of the absolute standout features is the flexibility it offers in creating custom environments. The ability to design and utilize maps for any size environment is truly revolutionary. Whether you're in a cozy virtual meeting room or an expansive digital workshop, Spatial Ops handles it beautifully. And let me tell you, while it works perfectly for smaller, focused interactions, the experience truly shines when you scale up – the larger the environment, the better it gets! It creates this incredible sense of presence and possibility, allowing teams to spread out, brainstorm, and interact in ways that just aren't achievable in traditional video calls.

Beyond the technical brilliance of the environment creation, the user experience is wonderfully intuitive. Everything from navigating your space to interacting with objects and other avatars feels fluid and responsive. It genuinely feels like you're there, collaborating side-by-side with your colleagues or friends, regardless of where they are in the real world. This level of immersion fosters stronger connections and significantly boosts productivity for any kind of shared project.

Spatial Ops isn't just a tool; it's an experience that makes the Meta Horizon platform truly come alive for purposeful interaction. If you're looking for a way to transform your virtual meetings, workshops, or even just social hangouts into something truly groundbreaking and engaging, you absolutely have to check this out. It's a game-changer that sets a new standard for what VR collaboration can be."

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for this incredible and thoughtful review! We’re absolutely thrilled to hear that the scale and flexibility of the Map Editor have redefined the experience for you.

Your feedback is incredible. We'd love to have you in our community! Join us on Discord here: https://discord.com/invite/EGrr5UPeb9

reviews.review_description: I love it so good it almost feels real never seen something like this devs please ￼keep updating the game and make more dlc’s ￼I would love to see a dlc that is a shop so you can make your home like a store

developer_response.body:
Thanks a lot for the review! So glad to hear players like you enjoying the game and the dlc's!

That sounds like a good idea "shop theme", please join our Discord and share us your map creation!

reviews.review_description: This is a great game. I love how it keeps you on your toes.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the review and support!

reviews.review_description: First time user really enjoyed this game

developer_response.body: We're glad you enjoyed your first time playing. Thanks for the support!

reviews.review_title: Hands down the best VR experience!
reviews.review_description: This game is mind blowing.  The arena mode is what sets this game apart from anything else.  The ability to completely customize your map and play with others in the same location is amazing.  And since it's mixed reality and free roaming, all the skepticism of motion sickness goes away.  This game is a must have for all quest 3 owners.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the amazing review! We’re thrilled to hear you’re loving the Arena mode experience.

Your support means the world to our team—and we totally agree, MR is a game-changer for motion sickness! 🔥

reviews.review_description: This Game is awesome remember me the arcade time crisis

developer_response.body: Thanks a lot, really glad it gives you that Time Crisis vibe!

reviews.review_description: This is really fun. The whole family loves it!

developer_response.body: Thank you for the great review! So glad to hear your whole family loves it!

reviews.review_description: Hands down the best arcade type shooter I've played for v.r. the action is smooth. Please keep going with this game. And make cooler guns and more levels for me to buy!

developer_response.body: Hey! Thank you so much for the support — we’re happy to take note of your feedback. 😎

reviews.review_title: So cool. - if you love shooters
reviews.review_description: Complete unique game. Remember the arcade games, where you had an attached toy gun and there were enemies hiding behind boxes. Eventually they come at you and the key was to shoot them before they shoot you. Now imagine is that game was in VR and came at you from every angle - including above your head - and sometimes all at the same time. That’s what this game feels like. Besides enemies, you can break boxes that give temporary upgrades, unlimited ammo, etc.  The spacial aspect is amazing. You swear you are traveling along train tracks or going into a mine via elevator. Really fun,heart pounding without being overboard , and just a ton of fun

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for this awesome review!  Glad that you having fun with the game and get the nostalgia feeling.

reviews.review_description:
So, this is a premature review since I’ve only played the first level on the single player mode easy. But WOW! I feel pretty confident that this game deserves 5 stars for unique gameplay. I am completely captivated by the use of mixed reality, sounds and music. The opening of portals to extend my room is brilliant! I wish I had a bigger play space, but this game makes such good use of my small condo. 
I can’t wait to jump back into this and continue! I also look forward to seeing what multiplayer is going to be like with my buddy. 

Great game, great price, great experience! Keep up the great work! 😊👍

developer_response.body: Hi Batman, thank you so much for your amazing review! We wanted to create a unique and creative MR shooter experience, so we’re really happy to hear you’re enjoying it. Each campaign level features a different setup. Hope you have a great time continuing the adventure! In the meantime, the multiplayer Arena offers a completely different kind of experience. Looking forward to hearing what you think!

reviews.review_description:
Very good the game and the VR experience
As always there could be a “solution” to’ end the game even if you are not perfect.
I mean a easy mode without dead solution 😃

developer_response.body:
Thanks a ton for the 5-star support! 🔥

Don’t worry Agent, every contribution to Spatial Ops counts 🫡 don't let Hatchet Corp get the better of you! See you out there.

reviews.review_description:
Major props to the developers. This is one of the most glorious examples of VR augmented reality gaming.

The controls are easy to understand. Within a minute or two we were running around in our living room, ducking behind walls, shooting weapons. It's so immersive!

We saw ourselves on the home cctv screaming and laughing our heads off.

The map creator mode means this game has so much potential. I can't wait to see where they take this.

Well done devs! This is very impressive work.

developer_response.body:
That's amazing to hear — screaming, laughing and having so much fun is exactly the reaction we were hoping for! 😄 

Huge thanks for the kind words, it really means a lot to the whole team!

reviews.review_description:
I purchased this on two of our headsets at home and it is a blast going through the house and firing at each other. The mapping experience is easy, relaxing, and satisfying and it’s easy to forget how long you’ve been mapping a space until your battery reminds you lol 😂. The gameplay is really engaging and very fun!! 

However one VERY important thing to note is that this game TANKS your battery so it’s imperative to get a good backup battery. Otherwise your games will only last about 75-90 minutes from 100% to 0% and even less if you’re mapping your space. 

Overall it’s definitely something I’d recommend to anyone wanting to play something similar to laser tag in their house but without a huge price tag attached to it!

Super entertainment and a
 workout at same time

developer_response.body:
That's great to hear you like our game!
Thank you so much for your 5 stars.

reviews.review_description:
I kinda like this one, would like to see more of it.
If I had to critique it, it would be to add more weapons.
Fun game though, I like how the portals open up for the shoot outs, reminds me of virtua cop and time crisis.

developer_response.body:
Love hearing that you’re enjoying Spatial Ops! 

Thank you for the feedback, we will try to do anything to get 5 stars experience for the player🫡

reviews.review_description: Just the right shootimg game i was looking for, you dont move so i dont get dizzy. Its like playing tine crisis in the arcades, althought the aim is slightly pushed up

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the kind words!

Adjusting your grip angle settings (General Settings → Vertical Grip Angle Offset) might help if you’re having difficulties with aiming (e.g., slightly pushed up).

reviews.review_description: So immersive, which other developers that the same approach with the portals and the fast pace

developer_response.body: Huge thanks for the kind words and the 5-star rating! it’s so rewarding to see players like you enjoying it!

reviews.review_description: Me and my brother were looking into buying this game until it came onto horizon+! The level creator tool is incredible and I love building different stages all over our house! 9.5/10 game would recommend

We’re so glad as well to have you as part of our community. If you ever have feedback or ideas, we’re always listening. :D

reviews.review_description: This is not my usual type of game and I absolutely loved it!  I really appreciated that I could set the difficulty level (easy) and loved that the play bounced from centre, right to left and above me! Well done! This is a new favourite.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the review! We’re thrilled to hear you’re loving the experience and we're very happy you chose Spatial Ops to be your new favorite.

reviews.review_description: So fun

developer_response.body: Thanks for the 5 stars! Glad you're having fun! 🎮

reviews.review_description: Exciting, fun!

developer_response.body: Thank you for the nice review. Glad you’re enjoying it!

reviews.review_description: Wow! I never thought i could turn my room in to a battlefield . This is good

reviews.review_description: This game is great! Graphics on point, great story line, this game has it all! A must play for lovers of shooter games!

developer_response.body:

reviews.review_description: Imagine turning your living room, garage, or backyard into a high-stakes laser tag arena. Spatial Ops blends fast-paced first-person shooter mechanics with your real-world environment

reviews.review_description:
New Concept and executed flawlessly
Smooth gameplay 
No bugs

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the 5 stars!
Stick around and join our Discord, to hear tips from other players and the devs!

reviews.review_description:
I was blown away by how well this game worked right out of the box. My son and I went to the park to try out an extra large premade template map, used my phone as hotspot, created a game, gave the room code to my son and a few seconds later I could see him with a virtual vest and gun in his hand. It was just magical being able run around and shoot each other in this huge level, we were laughing like maniacs. Didn't realize how long we played until tracking started to become an issue as it started becoming dark outside. 

However the next time we played, my son couldn't join my game and I couldn't join his game. I went on discord to request help, resolution games staff were quick to respond and were very helpful with many things to try especially since it was still a holiday in there country. I tried a few things, but no change, I was about to give up but after a days the problem seemed to have fixed itself. 

I've played a few times and no issues so far, so fingers crossed. But it's nice to know if issue pops up again that resolution games fully stand by their product and will be quick to provide any support necessary. 

I have a friend in another country  that bought the game. Looking forward to trying this game out with both local and remote players at the same time for the ultimate VR/MR experience!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the 5 stars! We’re so glad to have you as part of our community. If you ever have feedback or ideas or the issue come back, we’re always listening and we will try to help!

Let’s keep making it awesome together! ♥️

reviews.review_description: I might have a small space still I found it much fun

developer_response.body:
Thanks a lot for the review! 
So glad you’re enjoying it!🔥

reviews.review_description: I don’t leave a lot of reviews but felt compelled to for this game. I upgraded my girlfriend from a Quest 2 to a Quest 3 almost just for this game! Lol. It is crazy fun to play with others but if you are doing it by yourself, the Campaign is tons of fun too! The possibilities are endless with games like this. reviews.review_description: I've been absolutely blown away by Spatial Ops on the Quest 3! 🚀 This game truly showcases the power of VR, immersing me in incredible environments. The gameplay is so engaging, and I love how it blends strategic thinking with thrilling action. It's a fantastic way to spend some time, offering a truly unique and fun experience. I can't recommend Spatial Ops enough for anyone looking for an amazing new VR adventure!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for sharing this. We put a lot of love into creating something exciting and memorable, so knowing it connected with you means a lot. Thanks again for the wonderful support!

reviews.review_description: Excellent fun, makes it feel like your house is moving around. It really is an all out  exciting game.

Thanks for the 5 stars! 
I agree, Mixed Reality is exciting! 
Keep moving Spatial Ops Agent!

reviews.review_description: Please mor update

developer_response.body: Thank you for the 5 stars!

reviews.review_description:
This is a game I really wanted to get when I got a Quest. Finally getting that Quest I had to cop this immediately! Though i did come to realise that my house is a bit compact for the arena modes. I need to be richer or just have open plan spaces. I hoped me and my friend could play the game at each other's house but gonna have to work around that a bit. But I love the idea of all this!

That being said, I played through the first mission of the solo campaign, and this is what I really expected from this game! Man, i feel like I'm in an arcade whilst also really being in the action! This is like Time Crisis but turned up a notch with the immersiveness! Not just pressing a pedal to dodge, but actually dodging physically, with your whole body! After that mission it felt like such a workout! It's exhilarating! I must say, the aiming has taken some getting used to, as well as seemingly hand clashing parameters, but when it clicks, it's brilliant! I had to stop myself going full John Woo with aiming my dual revolvers stacked over each other (flipping my dressing gown around like it was some cool jacket), because that seemed to make the guns go crazy and start break-dancing when I shot...not to mention the doves that started flying past (joking, the doves didn't happen)...but when i learned to stop doing that, it clicked! Great having enemies appear from beside you, behind you, above you! All real fun!
Though i hoped the co-op survival would be the campaign but with 2 of you and more windows opening with enemies for you both to go back-to-back on it. I really hope that you can think about bringing that in to it because that's what I thought it would be and that would be great for co-op for those of us with limited areas!
And also maybe a horde like wave mode in the way the campaign is! That would be awesome! Like randomly generated or scripted waves and different difficulties and such! Just a thought.
But even though i struggle with arena factors, I love what does work for me! The campaign is great! I'm gonna pace myself to savour it all but I will definitely replay it! But for those with useable space this is an excellent use of Mixed Reality and you'll love it! There is something for everyone here!

Devs - keep up the good work!

developer_response.body:
Thanks a ton for the 5 stars! We’re so glad to have you in our community. Reading about your 'John Woo' moments with the dual revolvers truly made our day! (By the way, we actually do have pigeons you can place in the Arena map... though they don't fly yet! :p)

Regarding the 'horde' mode: you should definitely dive into Co-op Survival in the Arena! You can use the Map Editor to turn your room into a tactical stronghold. Defend against waves, push for the boss encounter, and see how long you can hold the record!

To tell you a secret: you can actually play with your friend even if you aren't in the same house! Check the 'Remote Play' setting in the menu—Survival mode is a fantastic way to start playing remotely together.

Please join our Discord! We value detailed feedback like yours and we're very active there. It’s the perfect place to share your  clips and get tips from the devs and other players: https://discord.com/invite/EGrr5UPeb9
Keep being awesome!

reviews.review_description: Had a great time with this. Top notch sound and level design. Super fun!!!

developer_response.body: Thank you! Really appreciate hearing that the game is giving you a great experience.

reviews.review_description: If you have the space for the campaign it's worth checking out! Lots of fun!

developer_response.body:
Huge thanks!
If space is limited, playing the campaign mode may be a great way to enjoy the game. 😄

reviews.review_description: Good game very good only need little more condition to play level 5.wish me lucky thanks

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the 5 stars!
Good Luck on Level 5, Agent!

reviews.review_title: Fun game, but one big bug that ruins it
reviews.review_description:
Firstly, the game is great. The campaign is fun, and the house mapping for multiplayer and custom games is made really well.

Only issue is when you are holding a gun, and it gets too close to literally anything: a gun in the other hand, a wall, a barricade, it’ll point in a completely different direction and make it where you cannot shoot for a moment. This is incredibly frustrating and makes it hard to have fun.

developer_response.body:
Hi there! Thank you for the feedback, we’re here to help improve your experience. Regarding the weapon pointing away—are you experiencing this issue as a client during an Arena session, or does it happen in Campaign play as well?

Please feel free to join our Discord community: https://discord.com/invite/EGrr5UPeb9. It’s the best place for direct communication with the developers and to get tips from other players. We'd love to look into this for you!

reviews.review_description:
The best gaming experience ever.
I was already loving the arena mode.
Ended up buying 4 quest 3 to play with my family.
Finally got around to trying campaign.
And was so enjoyable.
Better experience than playing time crisis at the arcades.
Hoping for multiplayer campaign mode in the future

developer_response.body: Thank you for your support!

reviews.review_description: Have to try multiplayer still, but solo is nice

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the 5 stars!
Looking forward to hear from you after you try the multiplayer Arena!
Join our Discord to get more tips from other players and developers.

reviews.review_description: love it love it love

developer_response.body: Thank you! So glad you’re loving it!

reviews.review_description: Brilliant. I would give the game 10 🌟 if I could. I'm playing solo. Just please devs had more levels can't get enough of this game

developer_response.body:
Wow thank you! If 10 stars were possible, we’d frame that review on our wall.
For now, we’ll gladly take all 5 available 😉

We’re really happy you’re enjoying the solo experience!

reviews.review_description:
Pretty cool shooter. Keeps you on your toes.
Definatly worth getting for sure.
This game is so good! I can't get enough and it's alot of fun alone and with friends. I would buy again from the makers of this game.

developer_response.body: Huge thanks for the kind words and the 5-star rating! Our devs pour their hearts into every update, and it’s so rewarding to see players like you enjoying it!

reviews.review_description: Playing this with friends in mixed reality is amazing! Looking forward to more updates to the map editor, weapons and more custom rules!!

developer_response.body: Thanks a ton for the 5 stars! We’re so glad to have you as part of our community. If you ever have feedback or ideas, we’re always listening. Let’s keep making it awesome together!

reviews.review_description: yeah

developer_response.body: Thanks for the 5 stars!

reviews.review_description: Love this game!
very good game would reccomend it
This game seems really well made, but the shooting is so inaccurate that I gave up on it.

developer_response.body:
Hi there! We’re here to help. in the settings you can always adjust your aim/grip orientation that suit for your play.

If the problem continues, feel free to reach out to our support team at support@resolutiongames.com, or join our Discord community for a more direct conversation: https://discord.com/invite/EGrr5UPeb9. Thank you!

We're always looking for ways to improve, feel free to reach out to our support team at support@resolutiongames.com, or join our Discord community for a more direct conversation: https://discord.com/invite/EGrr5UPeb9. Let us know what features or modes would keep you coming back for more!
